# UC-22.13.71 · NERC CIP CIP-007-6 R5 — TACACS+ Privileged Access Logging on BES Cyber Systems

> **Criticality:** Critical &middot; **Difficulty:** Advanced &middot; **Pillar:** Security &middot; **Type:** Compliance

*We continuously evidence NERC CIP-007-6 R5 — privileged commands on BES Cyber System network devices are TACACS-logged with attribution. That is important for the audit, where proof needs to line up with what the rules expect.*

---

## Description

We continuously evidence NERC CIP-007-6 R5 — privileged commands on BES Cyber System network devices are TACACS-logged with attribution.

## Value

NERC CIP audits will probe BES Cyber System access. This UC produces continuous, BES-scoped, machine-attested evidence — the regulator-quality artefact.

## Implementation

Daily.

## Evidence

Saved search archived to `audit_evidence` with NERC CIP-007-6 R5 tagging.

## Control test

### Positive scenario

Privileged command on BES device. Evidence captured.

### Negative scenario

No privileged commands on BES devices. Empty result; control attested.

## Detailed Implementation

## Prerequisites

- UC-17.1.43 operational.
- `bes_cyber_asset_inventory.csv` maintained per CIP-002 attestation.
- `audit_evidence` with NERC CIP retention.

## Step 1-5

```ini
[UC-22.13.71: NERC CIP CIP-007-6 R5 — Privileged Command Evidence]
cron_schedule = 0 6 * * *
actions = summary_index
action.summary_index._name = audit_evidence
action.summary_index.marker = uc=22.13.71,reg=NERC_CIP,clause=CIP-007-6 R5
```

Quarterly review with NERC CIP compliance lead; annual audit submission for triennial NERC CIP audit.

## SPL

```spl
index=nac sourcetype="cisco:ise:syslog" MessageCode IN (11042, 11043) earliest=-1d
| lookup bes_cyber_asset_inventory.csv device_ip OUTPUT bes_classification
| where bes_classification IN ("Medium-Impact", "High-Impact")
| where match(command, "(?i)(write erase|no aaa|no logging|enable secret|config replace)")
| eval cip_clause="CIP-007-6 R5", control="BES_Privileged_Command_Audit"
| table _time, user, device_ip, command, bes_classification, cip_clause
| collect index=audit_evidence
```

## Visualization

CIP-007-6 panel: BES privileged command timeline.

## Known False Positives

1. Approved planned outages — annotate with NERC outage ticket.
